title: Cloudflare Earnings Beat Expectations
text: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) exceeded analyst projections in its third quarter earnings report. The company reported earnings per share of $0.27, surpassing the consensus estimate of $0.23 by $0.04. Revenue performance also topped expectations, reaching $562 million compared to the analyst consensus of $544.56 million. For the fourth quarter of 2025, Cloudflare projects EPS of $0.27 (consensus: $0.26) and Revenue of $588.50M-$589.50M (consensus: $580.70M). Full-year 2025 guidance includes EPS of $0.91 (consensus: $0.86) and Revenue of $2.14B (consensus: $2.68B). The company's stock closed at $222.50, reflecting significant gains: up 11.19% over three months and 153.68% over the past year. The earnings report showed strong momentum, with 27 positive EPS revisions and no negative revisions in the last 90 days. According to InvestingPro, Cloudflare maintains a good performance financial health rating.
